summary: The diff implements most of REQ-22 and REQ-23. New components and hooks cover the circular exposure wheel, cine color profile selector, anamorphic overlay, focal length indicator, blur strength toggle with localStorage persistence, and increased blur sigmas. However, several integration and AC-level details need verification due to truncated CameraPage and FocusEditPanel diffs.

missing_requirements.requirement: The Cinema Controls panel must slide up when Cinematic or Video mode is active
missing_requirements.reason: CameraPage.tsx is truncated and shows showCinemaControls state but the actual conditional rendering of CinemaControlsPanel with a slide-up animation tied to Cinematic/Video mode activation cannot be confirmed from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The cine color profile selector must apply a CSS/canvas filter to the live preview video element
missing_requirements.reason: useCineColorProfile.ts exposes a cssFilter string and CameraPage imports it, but the truncated CameraPage diff does not confirm the cssFilter is actually applied to the video/canvas element style.

missing_requirements.requirement: FocusEditPanel maximum blur intensity slider values must be raised so the bokeh mask produces a more pronounced separation
missing_requirements.reason: FocusEditPanel.tsx multiplies blurIntensity by 3 for the render but the Slider component max and default value props are not visible in the truncated diff, so raised slider bounds cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: useCinematicMode bakes letterbox bars directly onto the canvas output in addition to the separate AnamorphicOverlay component
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec requests an anamorphic overlay toggle as a separate UI element. The cinematic mode hook also rendering letterbox bars into the canvas was not requested and duplicates the overlay behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: useAnamorphicOverlay persists its toggle state to localStorage
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies localStorage persistence for blur strength in REQ-23. Persisting the anamorphic overlay toggle state was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: useCineColorProfile persists the selected color profile to localStorage
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify persisting the color profile selection across sessions; only blur strength persistence was explicitly required in REQ-23.
